title: Using semicolons and commas

questions.question_content:
**Choose whether a comma or a semicolon should be used in this sentence!**

> We are going skiing in \_\_\_\_\_\_ \_\_\_\_\_\_ and Big Sky, Montana this winter.

choices.label: A
choices.content: Park City, Utah$\redD{,}$ Jackson Hole, Wyoming$\redD{,}$

choices.label: B
choices.content: Park City, Utah$\redD{;}$ Jackson Hole, Wyoming$\redD{;}$

note: KA serves 1/4 questions to anonymous users. Passage and sample question captured for skeleton generation.
